description_long: This object is a vintage Shell gas pump, featuring a tall, rectangular body with a rounded top and a prominent illuminated globe displaying the Shell logo. The main body is painted in a combination of red and white, with visible weathering and grime, suggesting long-term outdoor use. The front panel includes a display window with mechanical dials and instructions, as well as a hose and nozzle attached to the side. The pump stands on a stained, tiled base, further emphasizing its age and use. The sides are relatively plain, with the red color dominating and a metallic handle visible. The overall design is classic and utilitarian, evoking mid-20th-century gas station aesthetics.
description: A weathered, vintage Shell gas pump with a red and white body, illuminated globe, and attached hose, standing on a stained tiled base.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the white back panel, rounded yellow globe top, and some grime on the surface.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the narrow red profile, visible hose, and metallic handle.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the Shell globe, mechanical dials, display window, and attached hose.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a plain red surface and the illuminated globe visible at the top.
attribute_fuel_pumps: One vintage fuel pump is present, painted red and white with a yellow Shell globe on top. It features a single hose and nozzle attached to the side, a mechanical display window, and a metallic handle. The style is distinctly mid-20th-century with visible weathering.
attribute_station_signage: A prominent illuminated Shell globe sign is mounted on top of the pump, displaying the Shell logo in red letters on a yellow background. No other signage is visible.
